interactions.summary: Which empire do you think is collapsing? The United States empire? The United States empire is collapsing, yes. And who is taking its place? No one can take the place of the American empire. So we live in a unipolar moment. And the closest historical analogy to today is something called the Bronze Age collapse. The Bronze Age.
